vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a complete absence of the expected botanical specimens. The 'String of Nickels', 'Mexican Mint', and 'Pothos' are not present in any of the provided images. The environment has been modified by the introduction of non-botanical tools (spoon and cylinder), suggesting an experimental or maintenance phase that has resulted in the total loss of the original plant life. The white rabbit anchor remains the only constant in the p3 pot, which is otherwise devoid of vegetation.
